source_instruction_snippets: You are a food blogger (User ID: customer_010). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the Raw Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check whether it is included in the Steak Lovers Set. If this dish is included in the set, ask the AI Service Agent to look for an item in the "Selected Steaks" category that is [High Protein] and has the [Highest Price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all
exclude_reason: Steak Lovers Set is explicitly in the text and should be handled by service/tool logic; observer should resolve the Raw Salmon visual referent instead.
